title: QualityGatesConfig
description: Promotion thresholds and fairness requirements for a single service. The authoritative source is the Pydantic model `{service}.config.QualityGatesConfig`. This JSON Schema is a tool-agnostic export — used by `scripts/validate_quality_gates.py`, by editors via yaml-language-server, and by CI to fail fast before pip install. It is kept in sync with the Pydantic model by `templates/service/tests/test_quality_gates_schema_sync.py` (PR-B1).

primary_metric.description: Metric name passed to sklearn cross_val_score (e.g. 'roc_auc', 'f1'). No surrounding whitespace.

primary_threshold.description: Minimum acceptable value of `primary_metric` on the held-out test set.

secondary_metric.description: Second metric used as a sanity check (e.g. 'f1' alongside roc_auc). No surrounding whitespace.

fairness_threshold.description: Disparate Impact Ratio floor; standard four-fifths rule defaults to 0.80.

latency_sla_ms.description: P95 inference latency SLA. Read by the load-test target.

protected_attributes.description: Feature names whose Disparate Impact Ratio is checked. Empty list means 'fairness was considered and no attribute applies' — combined with a demographic-looking target_column it is rejected at runtime by validate_against_data (heuristic ADR-005).

promotion_threshold.description: Minimum delta over the current production baseline required to auto-promote. 0.0 disables baseline-comparison promotion.
